name: lynx
description: LYNX — Code Analysis & Exploration with Semantic Architecture Reasoning. A codebase intelligence MCP server with persistent memory and narrative explanations.

scripts.test:native-core: npm run build && npm run build:native-core && node scripts/native-core-smoke.mjs && vitest run tests/unit/native-core/staging.test.ts tests/integration/native-core-pipeline.test.ts
scripts.benchmark:native-core: npm run build && npm run build:native-core && node scripts/native-core-benchmark.mjs
scripts.compare:native-core: npm run build && npm run build:native-core && node scripts/native-core-parity.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run typecheck:api && npm run test:api
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run build:native-core
scripts.bundle: npm run build && npm run build:native-core && esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node20 --outfile=dist/pkg-cli.cjs --external:better-sqlite3 --external:web-tree-sitter --external:tree-sitter-wasm --external:tree-sitter --external:tree-sitter-typescript --external:ws && node scripts/fix-pkg-deps.js && node scripts/build-native-extractor.js && pkg --config package.json dist/pkg-cli.cjs --public --targets node20-macos-arm64 --output dist/bin/lynx
scripts.bundle:all: npm run build && esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node20 --outfile=dist/pkg-cli.cjs --external:better-sqlite3 --external:web-tree-sitter --external:tree-sitter-wasm --external:tree-sitter --external:tree-sitter-typescript --external:ws && node scripts/fix-pkg-deps.js && node scripts/build-native-extractor.js --all && pkg --config package.json dist/pkg-cli.cjs --public --targets node20-macos-arm64,node20-macos-x64,node20-linux-x64,node20-linux-arm64,node20-win-x64 --output dist/bin/lynx
